ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Asset specific value - (ASST_SPCFC_VL)
ChangeRequest.comment:
## Contact person @Arianna.Nuvoli @Maria_Manuel.Henriques @Pietro.Ferroni ## Legal definition According to the instructions (Annex XVII, pag.26):
_"The asset-specific value shall be the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value in accordance with IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an asset-specific interest rate curve"_ ## Reason for inclusion AE integration ## Relevant Framework/Template - F 35.00.a - Asset encumbrance: Covered bonds issuance (a)
For the entire cover pool meaning _Loans and advances_, _Equities_, and _Debt securities_.
